title: How to show mirror column data into dashboards
excerpt: Hello, I am trying to show mirror column data to be displayed in dashboard. I know the workaround of showing the data using a formula column, not comfortable with that. Cannot use an external app like vlookup, etc. Pleas…

posts.author: mamta (Mamta Madhusudan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I am trying to show mirror column data to be displayed in dashboard. I know the workaround of showing the data using a formula column, not comfortable with that. Cannot use an external app like vlookup, etc. Please advise.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mamta,

Can you please clarify the widget you’re interested in pulling mirrored column data into? This will help us test this
